Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for accounts for a MikroTik network device

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Password bruteforcing attempts for account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} for a {event_src.vendor} network device on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.

Successful password bruteforcing for account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} for a {event_src.vendor} network device on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
